purpose: Machine-readable notes for repeatable public data ingestion jobs. Keep this in sync with docs/public-data-fetch-recipes.md and data-sources/real-public-data.seed.json.

encoding.fallbackTrigger: Decode as UTF-8 first; if replacement characters are common, retry Big5.

delimitedText.delimiterDetection: Detect delimiter from the header row. Supported delimiters: comma, semicolon, tab.
delimitedText.bomHandling: Trim UTF-8 BOM from the first header.
delimitedText.quoteHandling: Support double-quoted fields and escaped double quotes.

sharedRules.writeBoundary: Write only to base tables. Frontend reads only approved public views.

sources.currentUse: Creates 115年地方公職人員選舉 and 2026 mayor/councilor race shells so upcoming-election UI does not depend on old sample rows.
sources.knownBoundary: This is planned election/race structure only. Do not create future candidates from historical candidates.
nextParserNotes: When CEC publishes final 2026 race metadata, replace or reconcile these planned shell rows by stable external_id.
Township, village, and representative races stay out of this slice until the UI needs them.

filtering.reason: The official registry includes many inactive or low-signal parties. Product UI currently shows politically meaningful parties only.

fallback.notes: If the live download fails, keep the seed parties and include livePartyRegistry.error in the report.

knownIssues: The MOI download endpoint may return network-level fetch failed locally.
Do not block daily dry-runs on this source; fallback is expected and should be reported.

sources.currentUse: Seed references Taiwan plus 22 county/city records. Do not commit raw SHP/ZIP artifacts.
nextParserNotes: Download to tmp/ only.
Convert official county/city code, name, and geometry into normalized region records.
Keep map simplification output separate from source provenance.

sources.currentUse: Seed contains 2024 presidential and legislative metadata only.
nextParserNotes: Prefer official export/download endpoints when available.
Separate election event metadata from candidate rows.
Populate people first, then candidates linked by personExternalId and raceExternalId.
Use registration_status=registered for official registration lists and qualified for confirmed eligible lists.
Candidate ingestion should populate public_candidates only after source fields are verified.

sources.parser: fetchBytes + minimal ZIP central-directory reader + parseDelimitedRows in scripts/sync-real-public-data.mjs
sources.currentUse: Syncs 2024 presidential/legislative candidate rows plus 2022 direct municipality mayor, county/city mayor, and councilor rows. Party codes are mapped through elpaty.csv.

zipNotes.filenameEncoding: Big5/CP950 paths in the ZIP central directory are decoded with TextDecoder('big5').

skipped.partyListBallotChoices: 不分區政黨 elcand.csv rows are party ballot choices, not individual candidate records, so they are not written to the people/candidates schema.
skipped.townshipAndVillageLocalRaces: 2022 township mayors, representatives, and village chiefs are intentionally skipped in this slice.

nextParserNotes: Create a dedicated party ballot-choice model if the UI needs to show 不分區政黨票 as election choices.
2022 elected local officials are treated as current for the 2022-2026 term; later resignations, recalls, or by-elections need a separate update source.
Keep presidential and legislative candidate ingestion separated so future elections can be refreshed independently.
Do not use historical completed candidates as future announced-candidate data.

sources.currentUse: The sync script fetches the Legislative Yuan term 11 member dataset and writes rows with leaveFlag=否 into people.
nextParserNotes: Extend this source family later for local officeholders; keep Legislative Yuan sync separate from local officials.
Store role text in position and district or constituency text in district.
Use source-specific external IDs rather than names alone whenever available.
If the live download fails, keep seed people rows and report liveCurrentOfficeholders.status=fallback.

sources.privacyBoundary: Do not publish personal donation details. Company-level summaries require review before is_public=true.
nextParserNotes: First automate source availability and version checks.
Then map party-level annual totals.
Delay company relationship publication until the review workflow exists.

sources.parser: fetchBytes + ZIP reader + parseDelimited in scripts/sync-real-public-data.mjs
sources.privacyBoundary: Use party-level annual summaries only. Do not expose personal donation detail rows.
sources.currentUse: Reads political party_incomes and expenditures.csv from the official 113年度政黨政治獻金會計報告書 ZIP and maps rows to parties already included in public_parties.

fieldMapping.reportYear: 申報年度, ROC year converted to Gregorian

skipped.detailRows: incomes.csv and expenditures.csv contain personal or transaction-level details and are not written.
skipped.unlistedParties: Rows for parties outside the current public party allowlist are not written until the product includes those parties.

nextParserNotes: Consider storing all official parties before widening summaries beyond the current party allowlist.
Add extra public fields only if UI needs audit dates or accountant metadata.
Company-level contribution summaries still need review workflow before publication.
